testcase.name: test_upload_proof_endpoint_works_for_deposits
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_deposit_approval.py:154: in test_upload_proof_endpoint_works_for_deposits assert tx_response.status_code in [200, 201], f"Failed to create transaction: {tx_response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to create transaction: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","client_id"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","transaction_type"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","amount"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 in [200, 201] E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_deposit_approval_requires_proof
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_deposit_approval.py:195: in test_deposit_approval_requires_proof assert tx_response.status_code in [200, 201], f"Failed to create transaction: {tx_response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to create transaction: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","client_id"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","transaction_type"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","amount"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 in [200, 201] E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_deposit_approval_succeeds_with_proof
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_deposit_approval.py:228: in test_deposit_approval_succeeds_with_proof assert tx_response.status_code in [200, 201], f"Failed to create transaction: {tx_response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to create transaction: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","client_id"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","transaction_type"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","amount"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 in [200, 201] E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
